summary:
In dental care, study models facilitate accurate diagnosis, detailed preoperative planning, surgical guidance during operations such as extractions or implant placements, ensuring precision throughout multiple stages of intervention; they also support comprehensive patient education through visual aids provided directly before treatments begin.
To improve conciseness while retaining core information about their use cases and benefits within dentistry specifically,
I would suggest this revised summary instead based solely upon Agent’s original response focusing strictly around those aspects most pertinent given your instructions above regarding keeping it brief yet informative enough.: 
Study models enable thorough diagnostic assessment, meticulous pre-surgical preparation, guided procedural steps including extraction & implants with enhanced accuracy ; additionally aid informed patients via illustrative visuals prior actual work commences .
